completed_tasks.name: 01-01: Scaffold, design tokens, fonts, and Button atom
01-02: Navbar, Footer, and Lenis smooth scroll wired into root layout

decisions.decision: Next.js 16.2 + Tailwind CSS v4 @theme token system
decisions.rationale: CSS-first config, faster builds, native dark palette tokens

decisions.decision: Lenis for smooth scroll (not Locomotive Scroll)
decisions.rationale: Actively maintained, plays cleanly with GSAP ScrollTrigger
Zero FOUT, self-hosted, matches minimalist-futuristic brand direction

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 2 to gather context for Animation Infrastructure, then /gsd:plan-phase 2
context_notes: Phase 1 is fully complete and pushed to GitHub (https://github.com/pengr3/CLMC-Revamped-Website). Repository was just created this session. Phase 2 (Animation Infrastructure) is the immediate next phase — GSAP ScrollTrigger, Motion page transitions, hover micro-interactions, and hero parallax primitives. No work has started on Phase 2 yet. Discuss mode is 'discuss' so go through /gsd:discuss-phase 2 before planning.
